events.content: Documented harness lifecycle as broker-owned adapter preparation: Documented harness lifecycle as broker-owned adapter preparation

raw.question: Documented harness lifecycle as broker-owned adapter preparation
raw.chosen: Documented harness lifecycle as broker-owned adapter preparation
raw.reasoning: The shipped behavior keeps executable config serializable in SDKs while CLI-specific MCP/session setup runs in Rust broker adapters; docs need to clarify where hooks and custom harness definitions fit.

retrospective.summary: Added harness lifecycle documentation to the Harnesses docs page, covering SDK selection, broker adapter resolution, executable lookup, built-in adapter preparation, argv rendering, runtime events, and how SDK hooks differ from broker lifecycle adapters.
